sentence: 这家公司主要做货运业务。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī zhǔyào zuò huò yùn yèwù.
english: This company mainly handles freight transport.

sentence: 医生今天才确诊他得了肺炎。
pinyin: Yīshēng jīntiān cái quèzhěn tā déle fèiyán.
english: The doctor only confirmed today that he has pneumonia.

sentence: 公司的服务器遭到黑客攻击，数据泄露了。
pinyin: Gōngsī de fúwùqì zāodào hēikè gōngjī, shùjù xièlòu le.
english: The company's servers were attacked by hackers and data was leaked.

sentence: 这套陶瓷餐具是她从景德镇买回来的。
pinyin: Zhè tào táocí cānjù shì tā cóng Jǐngdézhèn mǎi huílái de.
english: This set of ceramic tableware was bought by her from Jingdezhen.

meaning: to investigate and handle (a criminal case)
sentence: 有关部门已对此事进行查处。
pinyin: Yǒuguān bùmén yǐ duì cǐ shì jìnxíng cháchǔ.
english: The relevant department has already investigated and handled this matter.
